text:
Assessment Instrument (IRF-PAI) is collected on all Medicare patients who receive services from an inpatient rehabilitation unit or hospital. The data collected for IRF-PAI are used to measure quality of care.

What does this file include? (variable highlights)

Pre-hospitalization living situation

Co-morbid conditions

Communication status

Functional status

Program: 
Medicare
Category: 
Assessment
Privacy Level: 
Research Identifiable Files

Availability of this file

Availability: 
Annual:
